mapper.select: SELECT pm.user_id AS userId, u.name AS nickname, u.email, pm.role, pm.joined_at AS joinedAt FROM project_members pm INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = pm.user_id WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN pm.role = 'OWNER' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, pm.joined_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_members (project_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{userId}, #{role}, NOW())
